message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam noteStyle rectangle
skinparam maxMessageSize 250
skinparam lifelinestrategy solid
skinparam responseMessageBelowArrow true
skinparam sequence {
    ArrowColor #333333
    ArrowThickness 1
    LifeLineBorderColor #CCCCCC
    LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    ParticipantBorderColor #CCCCCC
    ParticipantBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    ParticipantPadding 20
    BoxPadding 10
}

box "app" #LightGray
    participant "app\nPurchase 应用服务" as app
end box

box "ms-trade" #LightGray
    participant "purchaseDly 交易服务" as purchaseDly
end box

box "subscribe-service" #LightGray
    participant "purchaseDly 交易服务" as purchaseDly2
end box

box "ctu" #LightGray
    participant "ctu" as ctu
end box

box "payment-service" #LightGray
    participant "payment-service" as paymentService
end box

box "cpw" #LightGray
    participant "cpw" as cpw
end box

box "payment" #LightGray
    participant "payment" as payment
end box

box "upm" #LightGray
    participant "upm" as upm
end box

box "public-service" #LightGray
    participant "public-service" as publicService
end box

box "product" #LightGray
    participant "product" as product
end box

box "subscribe" #LightGray
    participant "subscribe" as subscribe
end box

box "charging" #LightGray
    participant "charging" as charging
end box

box "order" #LightGray
    participant "order" as order
end box

box "proxy" #LightGray
    participant "proxy" as proxy
end box

box "campaign" #LightGray
    participant "campaign" as campaign
end box

== 连续购买 ==
group 连续购买
    activate app
    app -> purchaseDly: queryContinuousTokenMemCache 查询连续订阅token
    activate purchaseDly
    purchaseDly -> purchaseDly: 返回查询连续订阅token的响应
    deactivate purchaseDly
    
    alt token不存在或者失效
        app -> purchaseDly: updateContinuousTokenMemCache 保存连续订阅token
        activate purchaseDly
        purchaseDly -> purchaseDly: 返回保存连续订阅token的响应
        deactivate purchaseDly
    end
    
    app -> paymentService: getPaymentAccountInfo 查询支付账号
    activate paymentService
    paymentService -> payment: getPaymentAccountInfo 查询支付账号
    activate payment
    payment -> payment: 返回查询支付账号的响应
    deactivate payment
    paymentService -> paymentService: 返回查询支付账号的响应
    deactivate paymentService
    
    app -> paymentService: getPaymentAccountInfo 返回查询支付账号的响应
    activate paymentService
    paymentService -> payment: getPaymentAccountInfo 返回查询支付账号的响应
    activate payment
    payment -> payment: 返回查询支付账号的响应
    deactivate payment
    paymentService -> paymentService: 返回查询支付账号的响应
    deactivate paymentService
    
    app -> paymentService: getPaymentAccountInfo 返回查询支付账号的响应
    activate paymentService
    paymentService -> payment: getPaymentAccountInfo 返回查询支付账号的响应
    activate payment
    payment -> payment: 返回查询支付账号的响应
    deactivate payment
    paymentService -> paymentService: 返回查询支付账号的响应
    deactivate paymentService
    
    app -> paymentService: paymentAccountManagement 注册支付账号
    activate paymentService
    paymentService -> payment: createPaymentAccount 创建支付账号
    activate payment
    payment -> payment: 返回创建支付账号的响应
    deactivate payment
    paymentService -> paymentService: 返回创建支付账号的响应
    deactivate paymentService
    
    app -> paymentService: paymentAccountManagement 返回注册支付账号的响应
    activate paymentService
    paymentService -> payment: createPaymentAccount 创建支付账号
    activate payment
    payment -> payment: 返回创建支付账号的响应
    deactivate payment
    paymentService -> paymentService: 返回创建支付账号的响应
    deactivate paymentService
    
    app -> ctu: isUserWhiteList 查询用户是否是白名单用户
    activate ctu
    ctu -> ctu: 返回查询用户是否是白名单用户的响应
    deactivate ctu
end group

== 用户是否连续购买 ==
group 用户是否连续购买
    alt purchaseDly 连续购买返回null
        app -> purchaseDly: purchaseDly 连续购买返回null
        activate purchaseDly
        purchaseDly -> purchaseDly: 返回连续购买返回null的响应
        deactivate purchaseDly
        
        app -> mainNumberSegment: 查询手机号号段和归属地
        activate mainNumberSegment
        mainNumberSegment -> mainNumberSegment: 返回查询手机号号段和归属地的响应
        deactivate mainNumberSegment
        
        app -> mainNumberService: fetchIdentity 查询产品目录
        activate mainNumberService
        mainNumberService -> mainNumberService: 返回查询产品目录的响应
        deactivate mainNumberService
        
        app -> mainNumberQueryService: fetchIdentity 返回查询产品目录的响应
        activate mainNumberQueryService
        mainNumberQueryService -> mainNumberQueryService: 返回查询产品目录的响应
        deactivate mainNumberQueryService
    end
end group

== 用户连续购买可能没有连续购买的交易号 ==
group 用户连续购买可能没有连续购买的交易号
    alt purchaseDly 连续购买返回交易号
        app -> purchaseDly: purchaseDly 连续购买返回交易号
        activate purchaseDly
        purchaseDly -> purchaseDly: 返回连续购买返回交易号的响应
        deactivate purchaseDly
    end
end group

== 连续订阅 ==
group 连续订阅
    alt 新购
        app -> itemService: fetchItemSubscription 查询订购订购信息
        activate itemService
        itemService -> itemService: 返回订购订购信息
        deactivate itemService
        
        alt 上一个连续购买的续购
            app -> itemService: subscribe 更新订购/取消连续续购时间
            activate itemService
            itemService -> itemService: 返回续购
            deactivate itemService
            
            alt purchaseDly 连续购买返回null
                app -> purchaseDly: purchaseDly 连续购买返回null
                activate purchaseDly
                purchaseDly -> purchaseDly: 返回连续购买返回null的响应
                deactivate purchaseDly
            end
            
            app -> itemService: authenticate 内容签约(资本签约)
            activate itemService
            itemService -> itemService: 返回签约信息
            deactivate itemService
        end
        
        alt 资本签约接口
            alt purchaseDly 连续购买返回交易号
                app -> purchaseDly: purchaseDly 连续购买返回交易号
                activate purchaseDly
                purchaseDly -> purchaseDly: 返回连续购买返回交易号的响应
                deactivate purchaseDly
                
                app -> eventCalculatorService: calculatePrice 按照卡进行报价
                activate eventCalculatorService
                eventCalculatorService -> eventCalculatorService: 返回报价结果
                deactivate eventCalculatorService
                
                group 按年通道资本订购
                    app -> paymentServices: autoAdaptedPayChannels 适配支付方式
                    activate paymentServices
                    paymentServices -> paymentServices: 返回适配支付方式的响应
                    deactivate paymentServices
                end group
                
                group 按年通道非资本订购
                    app -> paymentServices: autoAdaptedPayChannels 适配支付方式
                    activate paymentServices
                    paymentServices -> paymentServices: 返回适配支付方式的响应
                    deactivate paymentServices
                    
                    alt 根据系统配置该与支付方式是支付宝,微信,微信商户号,微信Paypal的支付,
                        app -> orderManagementService: createOrder 创建订单
                        activate orderManagementService
                        orderManagementService -> orderManagementService: 返回创建订单的响应
                        deactivate orderManagementService
                    end
                end group
            end
        end
    end
end group

== 非新购 ==
group 非新购
    alt 资本签约接口
        app -> itemService: authenticate 内容签约(资本签约)
        activate itemService
        itemService -> itemService: 返回签约信息
        deactivate itemService
        
        alt purchaseDly 连续购买返回交易号
            app -> purchaseDly: purchaseDly 连续购买返回交易号
            activate purchaseDly
            purchaseDly -> purchaseDly: 返回连续购买返回交易号的响应
            deactivate purchaseDly
            
            app -> eventCalculatorService: calculatePrice 按照卡进行报价
            activate eventCalculatorService
            eventCalculatorService -> eventCalculatorService: 返回报价结果
            deactivate eventCalculatorService
            
            group 按年通道资本订购
                app -> paymentServices: autoAdaptedPayChannels 适配支付方式
                activate paymentServices
                paymentServices -> paymentServices: 返回适配支付方式的响应
                deactivate paymentServices
            end group
            
            group 按年通道非资本订购
                app -> paymentServices: autoAdaptedPayChannels 适配支付方式
                activate paymentServices
                paymentServices -> paymentServices: 返回适配支付方式的响应
                deactivate paymentServices
                
                alt 根据系统配置该与支付方式是支付宝,微信,微信商户号,微信Paypal的支付,
                    app -> orderManagementService: createOrder 创建订单
                    activate orderManagementService
                    orderManagementService -> orderManagementService: 返回创建订单的响应
                    deactivate orderManagementService
                end
            end group
        end
    end
end group

== 支付订单 ==
group 支付订单
    app -> orderPaymentService: payOrder 支付订单
    activate orderPaymentService
    orderPaymentService -> orderPaymentService: 返回支付订单的响应
    deactivate orderPaymentService
    
    group 支付方式是连续支付
        app -> itemService: batchSubscribe 批量订购
        activate itemService
        itemService -> itemService: 返回批量订购的响应
        deactivate itemService
        
        app -> paymentServices: directPayment 付费
        activate paymentServices
        paymentServices -> paymentServices: 返回付费的响应
        deactivate paymentServices
        
        group 支付成功
            app -> paymentServices: directPayment 付费
            activate paymentServices
            paymentServices -> paymentServices: 返回付费的响应
            deactivate paymentServices
            
            group 支付成功回调
                app -> orderPaymentService: payOrder 返回支付订单的响应
                activate orderPaymentService
                orderPaymentService -> orderPaymentService: 返回支付订单的响应
                deactivate orderPaymentService
            end group
        end group
        
        group 支付失败回调
            app -> paymentServices: directPayment 付费
            activate paymentServices
            paymentServices -> paymentServices: 返回付费的响应
            deactivate paymentServices
        end group
    end group
end group

== 异步支付结果异步回调,支付成功异步回调支付成功,支付失败异步回调支付失败 ==
group 异步支付结果异步回调,支付成功异步回调支付成功,支付失败异步回调支付失败
    alt payNotify notifyStatus 支付成功异步回调支付成功
        app -> payNotify: notifyStatus 支付成功异步回调支付成功
        activate payNotify
        payNotify -> payNotify: 返回支付成功异步回调支付成功的响应
        deactivate payNotify
        
        app -> itemService: batchSubscribe 批量订购
        activate itemService
        itemService -> itemService: 返回批量订购的响应
        deactivate itemService
        
        group 按年通道资本订购
            app -> paymentServices: autoAdaptedPayChannels 适配支付方式
            activate paymentServices
            paymentServices -> paymentServices: 返回适配支付方式的响应
            deactivate paymentServices
        end group
        
        group 按年通道非资本订购
            app -> paymentServices: autoAdaptedPayChannels 适配支付方式
            activate paymentServices
            paymentServices -> paymentServices: 返回适配支付方式的响应
            deactivate paymentServices
            
            alt 根据系统配置该与支付方式是支付宝,微信,微信商户号,微信Paypal的支付,
                app -> orderManagementService: createOrder 创建订单
                activate orderManagementService
                orderManagementService -> orderManagementService: 返回创建订单的响应
                deactivate orderManagementService
            end
        end group
    end
    
    alt payNotify notifyStatus 返回支付成功回调结果的响应
        app -> payNotify: notifyStatus 返回支付成功回调结果的响应
        activate payNotify
        payNotify -> payNotify: 返回支付成功回调结果的响应
        deactivate payNotify
        
        app -> historyOrderManagementService: batchFetchHistoryOrders 查询历史订单
        activate historyOrderManagementService
        historyOrderManagementService -> historyOrderManagementService: 返回查询历史订单的响应
        deactivate historyOrderManagementService
        
        alt 购买支付成功的次数上限没有超过5次
            app -> purchaseDly: purchaseDly 连续购买返回交易号
            activate purchaseDly
            purchaseDly -> purchaseDly: 返回连续购买返回交易号的响应
            deactivate purchaseDly
        end
    end
end group

== 订单支付成功 ==
group 订单支付成功
    group 订单支付成功
        app -> order: 订单支付成功结果查询
        activate order
        order -> order: 返回订单支付成功结果查询的响应
        deactivate order
    end group
    
    group 连续购买查询成功
        app -> order: 连续购买查询成功结果
        activate order
        order -> order: 返回连续购买查询成功结果的响应
        deactivate order
    end group
    
    group 订单查询成功
        app -> order: 返回订单查询成功结果，修改会员状态
        activate order
        order -> order: 返回订单查询成功结果，修改会员状态的响应
        deactivate order
    end group
end group

== 连续购买成功异步回调，修改为连续付费中 ==
group 连续购买成功异步回调，修改为连续付费中
    app -> historyCampaignService: setLotteryInfo 更新中奖信息为已生成
    activate historyCampaignService
    historyCampaignService -> historyCampaignService: 返回更新中奖信息为已生成的响应
    deactivate historyCampaignService
end group

== 连续订阅 ==
group 连续订阅
    alt 支付成功连续扣款周期到达(24小时)订单从连续购买周期到达(24小时)从连续购买状态修改为支付成功
        app -> continuousBilling: isatContinuousCharging 更新支付
        activate continuousBilling
        continuousBilling -> continuousBilling: 返回更新支付的响应
        deactivate continuousBilling
    end
end group

== 连续购买 ==
group 连续购买
    app -> purchaseDly: 连续购买
    activate purchaseDly
    purchaseDly -> purchaseDly: 返回连续购买的响应
    deactivate purchaseDly
    
    app -> app: stopPurchase 返回连续购买的响应
    activate app
    app -> app: 返回连续购买的响应
    deactivate app
end group

@enduml
```
